notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Randy Arozarena out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
